summary: Implemented explicit M3 runtime save/load support across save-format and sim-core. M3 snapshots now preserve polity/suzerain data, obligations/audits/fulfillment claims, administrative burden inputs, characters, relationships, offices, appointments/enfeoffments, policies, postwar arrangement state, and succession state. M3 load rejects missing, malformed, future-version, and cross-manifest data before runtime replacement.

tests_run.result: Initial red phase: 4 failures from requestSaveV1 refusing state.m3 before implementation.
3 files passed, 29 tests passed after implementation.
2 files passed, 12 tests passed; M1 golden fixture and M2 save/load behavior remain compatible.
Node/worker hello, command/query, and save/load hashes matched. Save/load hash 28074edd, byte length 10920.
3650-day baseline passed. dayThroughputPerSecond=11757, saveByteLength=9980, saveNanoseconds=1940900, loadNanoseconds=2457000.
Architecture boundaries passed; determinism passed; root vitest 24 files/163 tests passed; web vitest 1 file/3 tests passed.

tests_run.command: node -e JSON parse/shape check for M3-SAVE-RUNTIME-001

tests_run.result: Modified allowed files: packages/save-format/src/index.ts, packages/sim-core/src/command-query-v1.ts, project/tasks/active/M3-SAVE-RUNTIME-001.json, tests/save-load-contract.test.ts, tests/sim-core-m3-polity-vassalage.test.ts, tests/sim-core-m3-tribute-troop-obligations.test.ts; new handoff JSON in project/messages/outbox.

decisions: Extended Save Envelope v1 WorldState v0 DTO with explicit optional state.m3 rather than changing D-011 or introducing a new envelope version.
Malformed M3 save data rejects in save-format decode with stable invalid-schema paths under body.authoritativeSnapshot.state.m3.* before sim-core runtime replacement.
Loading into an existing M3 runtime now requires state.m3 and rejects missing data as a semantic-invariant at state.m3; M1/M2 runtimes remain compatible with saves lacking M3.
No platform persistence, compression, object graph serialization, database, or new production dependency was introduced.
risks: R3 save/schema change requires systems_architect review and QA follow-up before acceptance.
M3 DTO parser is intentionally explicit and broad; future M3 slices must be added to the DTO and rejection tests rather than relying on implicit object serialization.
requested_action: Review the R3 M3 runtime save/load DTO/schema and load rejection semantics, then route to QA if architecture review passes.
